title: Immersive Cooking
description: An expansion to Farmer's Delight, adding tonnes of new, immersive ways to cook.
body:
Immersive Cooking is a Farmer's Delight addon intended to greatly expand the players' options when cooking, both in the form of new foods, tools, and decoration.



Immersive Cooking currently adds:

99 different Drawers, one for each type of wood, with either a smooth stone, blackstone, andesite, diorite, granite, or quartz countertop, as well as a standalone countertop. All works like a pantry, but can only be accessed from the front, all other sides act like a normal block. The standalone countertops will be added back in 2.0.2.

117 different Counters, decorative version of Drawers, also includes Brick and Nether Brick, besides the vanilla wood types. Made with planks instead of a full Pantry.
Stove Hood, a decorative light source perfect for stoves. (Will be added back in 2.0.1)
Glazed Tiles, Checkered Tiles, and Glazed Checkered Tiles, basic decorative blocks, now with slabs, too!

Food, in the form of:
- Diced Onions
- Bamboo Slices
- Potato Slices
- Fried Potato Slices
- Potato Cubes
- Fried Potato Cubes
- Raw Spider Shank
- Clean Spider Shank
- Smoked Spider Shank
- Raw Spider Cutlet
- Cooked Spider Cutlet
- Pyttipanna
- Curry Base



Some planned features include, but are not limited, to:
- Oven
- Knife Block
- Mixing Bowl
- Sink
- Pizza Stone
- Jars
